calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-09-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-09-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Irene Burns.
Jonathan Bornstein, Esq. for for Plaintiff: John Arhancet, present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Michael Wall and LaNell J. Lucus.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Judgment for Restitution and possession of premises located at 4417 Cabrillo St., #4, San Francisco.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Back-Rent and Damages of $6,566.40
Costs of $278.80, for a Total of $6,845.20
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DANIEL BORNSTEIN FOR PLAINTIFF JOHN ARHANCET, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT
DEFENDANT MICHAEL WALL NOT PRESENT
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY RONNIE GIPSON, JR FOR DEFENDANT LANELL LUCAS

THIS CAUSE COMES ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT AS NOTED ABOVE. DEFENDANT MICHAEL WALL IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT ORDERS JURY DEMAND STRICKEN AS TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL WALL AND MATTER IS TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.

COMMISSIONER SUE M. KAPLAN; CLERK CLARK BANAYAD, NOT REPORTED (218)

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD AS TO DEFENDANT LANELL LUCAS. CASE NOT SETTLED. TRIAL DATE TO REMAIN.

JUDGE PRO TEM ROBERT RYAN; CLERK CLARK BANAYAD; NOT REPORTED (218)
